{{Quote|I am a chamberlain of the academy... generally I look after maintenance and supply, here.|translated=1|Adrenas to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KotOR game" />}}
'''Adrenas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] who spoke [[Twi'leki/Legends|Ryl]] rather than [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as his native tongue. Although he could also speak Basic, he refused because he feared his strong accent would be mocked. He worked as the [[Chamberlain/Legends|chamberlain]] at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. However, despite his membership he did not train or study as a proper [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Sith student]]. Adrenas met his [[Death/Legends|death]], together with his fellows, when [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] killed his way through the complex after finding the world's [[Star Map]].

==Behind the scenes==
If the player informs [[Uthar Wynn]] about [[Yuthura Ban]]'s plot to overthrow him, then the player has the option of siding with Wynn. Adrenas will agree to poison Yuthura's bath.
